CASE DISMISSED , AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-17-2003 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO THE REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA TO THIS COURT ON NOVEMBER 25, 2002 THAT HE HAD NO KNOWLEDGE OF THIS COMPLAINT AND IN FACT DID NOT FILE IT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
